text.message: OJ do we have a problem already lol
Why you putting road up there for?
Is what red should do is plow both of us and take my bait
I wanted to make my wood port more valuable
I’m not winning yet . Plus black plowrd you
Don’t try and play victim now oj
Yes but last person to cause harm is the culprit not the initiator of the troll 🧌 😀
Plus lol, come on look at your position “I’m the victim “ ehh
When blue and red are in the lead don’t be crying “why are you stealing from me!!! Blue and red are ahead”
how i am in the lead?
I mean you didn’t even challenge it
Move the robber and I’ll do it
if i move can you give two woods
if blue takes rd its over
